retrieved_result: Windows Server Failover Clustering (WSFC) "Windows Server Failover Clustering (WSFC) is a feature of the Windows Server platform for improving the high availability ( HA) of applications and services. WSFC, which is the successor to Microsoft Cluster Service (MSCS), can be administered through the Failover Cluster Manager snap-in. Download"
Decision_Reason: The result is about Windows Server Failover Clustering (WSFC) and high availability, not about debugging or API integration.
